_comment: Recorded reference run for the LifeOps quality benchmarks (#10723). TRIAGE: the committed fixed-quality mock model (triage/fixtures.ts, 7 deliberate errors over the 56-item corpus) driven through the REAL plugin-inbox classifier parse/validate path — fully deterministic, so the gate asserts an EXACT match against this block; editing the corpus or fixtures requires re-recording it in the same change (run `bun run bench:triage`, copy results/triage-results.json). TIMELINESS: the REAL plugin-personal-assistant scheduled-task tick replayed over two 4-day 2026 DST windows at a 5-minute cadence (2×1153 ticks); the gate enforces budgets.json (counts exactly zero, deviation ceilings) rather than exact equality because cron-next-fire walks Intl tzdata. The unit lane cross-checks this file against budgets.json so the recorded reference always satisfies the committed floors.
